name: agent-bridge-local
description: Local marketplace for the agent-bridge plugin — a bidirectional agent bridge exposing antigravity_agent, claude_agent, and codex_agent as MCP tools, plus delegation and cross-model code-review skills.

plugins.name: agent-bridge
plugins.description: Bidirectional agent bridge as an MCP server: exposes `antigravity_agent` (spawn an Antigravity agent — Gemini models — via the `agy` CLI), `claude_agent` (spawn a Claude agent via the `claude` CLI), and `codex_agent` (spawn an OpenAI Codex agent via the `codex` CLI), plus skills for delegating to Antigravity and for running cross-model code reviews.
